ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., Logistic Regression, Decision Tree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "window" INTEGER /* Window or iteration number for the evaluation */,
  "permutation" INTEGER /* Permutation number for the evaluation */,
  "awareness" REAL /* Awareness metric for the model */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence metric for the model */,
  "correct" REAL /* Correct classification rate for the model */,
  "score" REAL /* Score or accuracy metric for the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the evaluation */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the evaluation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the evaluation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the evaluation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation that used this configuration */,
  "hyperparameter" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation that generated this result */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., precision, recall, F1 score) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model or dataset being versioned */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset or model being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the evaluation */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was shared with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the share was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the share was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the share */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sharing_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted permission */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being accessed */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)
